CoverBlock.description: Use ONLY as the sole section on Page 1 to create the cover title sheet.

schema.title: Document main title
schema.subtitle: Document subtitle or descriptive tag
schema.author: Name of the speaker, presenter, or author
schema.date: Date of the presentation or event

TwoColumnBlock.description: Use when comparing two topics, showing pros and cons side-by-side, or presenting two lists in parallel.

schema.leftColumnHeader: Header for the left column card
leftColumnBullets: Array of bullet point strings for the left card
schema.rightColumnHeader: Header for the right column card
rightColumnBullets: Array of bullet point strings for the right card

MultiCardGrid.description: Use when you have 3 or 4 distinct, separate points, modules, or features to summarize.

cards.content: Short paragraph text or explanation for this card

ProcessTimeline.description: Use for chronological timelines, step-by-step processes, sequential milestones, or flow stages. Usually occupies a full page.

steps.header: Short title header for this step

DataTable.description: Use when slides contain tables, numerical matrices, or grid comparisons. Usually occupies a full page.

headers: Array of column header title strings
rows: Array of strings representing cell values in a row

HeroCallout.description: Use when a slide is dominated by a single giant quote, core takeaway, high-impact statistic, or central thesis.

schema.quoteText: The main quote, core lesson, or high-impact takeaway statement
schema.author: Source, speaker, or author of the quote (optional)
schema.highlightText: Sub-caption, secondary note, or context about the quote

MediaBlock.description: Use to display an image or chart from the harvested images list alongside text.

schema.imageId: The image ID string (e.g. 'image_1.png') matching one of the provided harvested images
schema.caption: Image caption or description
schema.textContent: Paragraph text explaining the slide topic, wrapping around the image
bullets: Array of optional supporting bullet points placed below the text

StandardTextBlock.description: Use as the default layout block for standard slide summaries containing headings and bullet points.

bullets: Array of bullet point strings representing slide takeaways
